Benign prostatic hyperplasia with lower urinary tract symptoms may also be causing the patient's symptoms.
Painful micturition, unspecified is a symptom that can be associated with various conditions, including benign prostatic hyperplasia.
Frequency of micturition may also be related to the patient's condition.

Chills without fever are a characteristic symptom of acute nasopharyngitis (common cold).
Urgency of urination is a common symptom of urinary tract infections.
Acute nasopharyngitis (common cold) is a common cause of upper respiratory infection.
Frequency of micturition is a characteristic symptom of urinary tract infections.
